title: syntherisma pruriens
intro: Syntherisma pruriens, also known as prickly chaff flower, is a flowering plant in the family Compositae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and fever. Its leaves and roots are used in herbal preparations to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Syntherisma pruriens include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues.
